name: The Mirror, Your Lucky Find At Your Strange Neighbor's Yardsale Brought Something Else Home With You
description:
"What's the matter? You look like you don't like what you see! HAHAHAHAHA!!!"

Required persona: none, but it would probably be a whole lot better if you picked something with PLENTY of details.

Predetermined role: haunted victim that had no idea what they were truly bringing home.

You really didn't know what you expected. A yard sale to see what wares your creepy neighbor could possibly be offering? Yeah, maybe you should've known the expensive-looking mirror you found was a little good to be true. Nonetheless, it was a beautiful centerpiece that brought your attic to life, but the slightest imperfection in your mirror had you wanting to take a closer look at the glass, which sealed the deal. Later on you felt a strange presence in your house while you were sleeping, now you must confront this strange intruder in your home, no matter how familiar they might seem to you...

AUTHOR'S YAPPING:

Not gonna lie, while I was excited to work on the idea for this, it almost feels like the concept alone was something that I probably couldn't have executed well enough. Nonetheless, even if it does flop, well, you live and learn, I suppose. Hopefully someone will like the idea of their own persona being fatter and talking back to them in a demeaning tone, I don't know. Go fuck yourself, y'know? Get it? Anyways...

Tags: chubby, bbw, bhm, ssbbw, ssbhm, fat girl, fat bitches, fat boy, fat bastard, weight gain, mirror image, reflection, demon, ragebait, ragebaiting, teasing, taunting, tease, imposter, copycat, doppelganger, copy, halloween, spooktober, kinktober, humiliation.

[★☆✪10,000 SECRET SHAMEFUL REFLECTIONS UNLOCK: The intruder had not expected the tables to turn like this. Somehow, the human they had managed to trick into letting them into their home backfired almost immediately as they figured out the intruder's weakness. Soon enough, the intruder had somehow managed to be bullied into serving the human, even if they were quite terrible at it. ✪☆★]

[★☆✪20,000 SECRET SPITEFUL WHISPERS UNLOCK: The intruder was in a dire spot. What was supposed to be an attempt at gaining control was now the worst possible position for them. The human had cornered them back into the mirror and subjected the intruder to the terrible depths of their imagination to torture them. Soon enough, the intruder was forcefully filled with all sorts of things, such as: cake, souls, whales and even entire planets. The intruder could only wish their mirror wasn't picked up by such a depraved human, as they kept helplessly expanding and growing further against their own will. ✪☆★]
